evals.prompt: Design a data ingestion pipeline for 50,000 IoT devices publishing telemetry every 30 seconds. Data must be queryable within 60 seconds and retained for 30 days (raw) and 1 year (aggregated).
evals.expected_output: Kafka ingestion, time-series storage, downsampling strategy, retention policies
expectations: Kafka as ingestion layer with device_id partition key
Downsampling: raw (30 days) to hourly (1 year)

evals.prompt: Design video storage and lifecycle management for 200 cameras recording 24/7. Storage must support instant playback for last 7 days and archived access for up to 1 year.
evals.expected_output: S3 bucket structure, lifecycle policies, HLS segment management, cost optimization
expectations: S3/MinIO bucket structure organized by site/camera/date
Lifecycle policies: hot (7d) to warm (30d) to cold (90d) to archive (365d)
Cost estimate per camera per month
